requirement_text: Add command accepts URL or text with auto-detection and optional flags
target_value: Item stored with correct type and metadata

requirement_text: List command shows items with filtering by type and tag
target_value: Correct items displayed in requested format

requirement_text: Show command displays full details of a single item by ID
target_value: All fields displayed for valid ID and 404 for invalid

requirement_text: Edit command updates title tags or description by ID
Delete command removes item and requires --confirm flag
target_value: Item removed only with explicit confirmation

requirement_text: Search command performs case-insensitive partial match across title description and content
Tag list command shows all tags with item counts
target_value: Tag name and count for each

requirement_text: Tag rename command updates tag across all items
List and export support table json and csv output formats
Export command writes all items in json or csv format
Import command reads items from json or csv file
Config file created with defaults on first run at XDG location
target_value: Config file exists with default values

requirement_text: Config set and show commands manage configuration values
Exit code 0 on success 1 on error 2 on invalid usage
